case_title: FRED NASE VS. WILLIAM E CASSIDY et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE DONNA J. HITCHENS, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER PATRICIA VAN STEENBERGE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF DEC-30-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON DEC-30-2002 AT 9:15 AM IN DEPT. 611, DIANE ELAN WICK. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, SENT FOR PROVE-UP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NASE, FRED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASSIDY, WILLIAM E THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 110 CARL STREET $11,384.07 RENT, $239.39 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,623.46, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-30-2002 9:15 AM FOR DEPT 611
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NASE, FRED AS TO DEFENDANT CASSIDY, WILLIAM E DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

JUDGE DIANE WICK, CLERK-BETH WILBER, REPORTER-FLOYD BUTLER: C/C FOR JURY TRIAL, BRENDA CRUZ KEITH APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; NO APPEARANCE BY WILLIAM CASSIDY, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER; CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE-UP WITHOUT THE DEFENDANT; MS. KEITH PRESENTS CASE IN CHIEF AND RESTS; JUDGMENT FORM IS SUBMITTED, AND THE COURT RULES FOR PLAINTIFF.

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick, clerk-beth wilber, reporter-Floyd Butler, 9:45AM: c/c for jury trial, Brenda Cruz Keith appears for the plaintiff, no appearance by William Cassiday, Defendant in Pro Per. Case proceeds as a prove-up without defendant. Ms. Keith waives opening statments, calls 1st witness for the plaintiff and begins direct examination:
NICHOLAS VRATARI S/E
EXH1 3 day notice ID/EV
No further questions, witness is thanked and excused
Ms. Keith calls 2nd witness and begins direct examination:
FRED NASE S/E
EXH2 Rental agreement ID/EV
No further questions witness is thanked and excused. There being no cross-examination, Ms. Keith rests and present the Court with the prayer.
The Court rules as follows:
Restitution and possession of premises at 110 Carl Street; forfeiture of agreement; a total of $11,384.07 rents and damages; $1475.00 attorney fees per schedule; $239.39 costs.

Ms. Keith submits judgment form and exhibits are withdrawn and returned.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Assigned To Trial Court
